objective: Collect, validate, and review real shadow-routing evidence for the qualified companion capability lfm25-1p2b-thinking-local on track website_audit.lighthouse_handoff / role priority_helper, then determine pilot-readiness.

pilot.reason: Both prerequisites met: (1) qualified model capability (lfm25-1p2b-thinking-local, score 0.9167) for website_audit.lighthouse_handoff/priority_helper, (2) 33 actionable shadow routing comparisons (91.67% coverage rate) collected. Pilot readiness review: ready-with-conditions. Required pre-pilot action: approve track and set state to eligible.
